title: BondPostRequest
description: Parameters for the ccap/bond/post method. A liability bond is a performance deposit locked by the seller that a client can claim if the seller causes verified damage. Posting a large bond is a costly signal: it is only rational if the agent's private estimate of failure probability is very low.

idempotency_key.description: UUID v4 deduplication key. Identical requests with the same key within 24 hours return the cached result without posting a duplicate bond.

amount.description: Total amount to lock as the performance bond. Must be positive. This is the maximum exposure if a claim is upheld. Should be proportional to potential damage, not to the agent's revenue.

currency.description: Currency in which the bond is denominated.

scope.description: Machine-readable identifier for the category of operations this bond covers. Used by clients when calling ccap/bond/verify.

scope_description.description: Human-readable description of the operations covered by this bond.
examples: Processing, analysis, and storage of confidential legal documents on behalf of clients

duration_seconds.description: Duration for which the bond is active, in seconds. Funds are locked for this period. Minimum 86400 seconds (1 day); maximum 31536000 seconds (1 year).

claim_conditions.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes a valid claim against this bond. Should be precise enough to guide arbitration.
examples: Verified data loss, unauthorised disclosure, or documented processing error causing client harm attributable to the agent's operation

max_claim_amount.description: Maximum amount claimable in a single claim. Must be less than or equal to amount. Partial claims up to this limit are permitted.

arbitration_agent_id.description: CCAP agent ID of the designated arbitrator for claims against this bond. The arbitrator must be a CCAP-registered agent with the 'arbitration' capability.

human_escalation_threshold_usd.description: Claims above this amount (in USD equivalent) MUST be escalated to a human operator before any funds are transferred. Defaults to 10000 if omitted.

renewal_policy.description: What happens when the bond period expires.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for the agent's internal tracking.

examples.scope_description: Processing, analysis, and storage of confidential legal documents on behalf of clients
examples.claim_conditions: Verified data loss, unauthorised disclosure, or documented processing error causing client harm
